homepage.heroSubline: Protecting homes across Chicagoland with superior gutter solutions. Classic Gutter Company: Quality you can trust, performance you can see.
aboutText: Classic Gutter Company, Inc. has been safeguarding Chicago homes and businesses from water damage for over a decade. Founded by lifelong Chicagoans, we understand the unique challenges our brutal winters and unpredictable summers pose to your property's well-being. We’ve seen it all, from historic brick bungalows in Logan Square to modern condos downtown.

Our approach is simple: provide honest assessments, durable materials, and expert craftsmanship. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind every project we undertake. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and delivering results that exceed expectations. We treat every property as if it were our own.

We're proud to be a part of the Chicago community. We source our materials locally whenever possible, support local charities, and strive to create lasting relationships with our customers. When you choose Classic Gutter Company, you're not just hiring a contractor; you're partnering with a neighbor.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote from Chicago's trusted gutter professionals. Call now!

services.name: Gutter Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert gutter installation for Chicago homes, built to last.
services.description:
Proper gutter installation is critical for protecting your Chicago home from water damage. Our team at Classic Gutter Company has extensive experience installing a wide range of gutter systems, from traditional aluminum to copper and steel. We carefully assess your property's specific needs, considering roof pitch, drainage patterns, and aesthetic preferences, to recommend the best solution. 

We use only high-quality materials and employ proven installation techniques to ensure a secure, leak-proof system that will withstand Chicago's harsh weather conditions. Our installation process includes precise measurements, seamless connections, and proper downspout placement to effectively channel water away from your foundation. We handle everything from start to finish, including debris removal and site cleanup.

Whether you're building a new home in Naperville or replacing old, damaged gutters on a vintage bungalow in Lincoln Park, Classic Gutter Company delivers exceptional installation services that will protect your investment for years to come. We offer a variety of styles and colors to complement your home's architecture and enhance its curb appeal.

faq.question: How long does gutter installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, installation takes one to two days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: What types of gutters do you install?
faq.answer: We install a variety of gutter materials including aluminum, copper, and steel, in a range of styles and colors.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all our gutter installations, covering both materials and workmanship.

services.name: Gutter Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable gutter repair services throughout Chicago.
services.description:
Chicago's freeze-thaw cycles and strong winds can wreak havoc on gutters. Classic Gutter Company provides comprehensive gutter repair services to address leaks, sagging, damaged downspouts, and other common issues. Ignoring minor gutter problems can lead to significant water damage to your roof, foundation, and siding.

Our experienced technicians will thoroughly inspect your gutter system to identify the source of the problem and recommend the most cost-effective repair solution. We use durable materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that withstand Chicago's extreme weather conditions. Whether you need a simple patch, a downspout replacement, or a complete section replacement, we have the expertise to get the job done right.

We understand the urgency of gutter repairs, especially during heavy rain or snow. That's why we offer prompt and reliable service throughout the Chicago area. Don't let damaged gutters compromise your home's protection. Contact Classic Gutter Company for a free inspection and estimate.

faq.question: How do I know if my gutters need repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include leaks, sagging, overflowing, and visible damage to downspouts or gutter sections.

faq.question: Can you repair gutters during the winter?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer winter gutter repair services, weather permitting. We take extra precautions to ensure safe and effective repairs in cold conditions.

faq.question: What is the cost of gutter repair?
faq.answer: The cost of repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the materials required. We provide free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Gutter Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Professional gutter cleaning services to keep your Chicago home protected.
services.description:
Clogged gutters can cause serious water damage to your Chicago home. Leaves, twigs, and debris accumulate in your gutters, blocking the flow of water and causing it to overflow. This can lead to damage to your roof, siding, foundation, and landscaping. Classic Gutter Company offers professional gutter cleaning services to keep your gutters clear and functioning properly.

Our experienced technicians use specialized equipment to safely and effectively remove debris from your gutters and downspouts. We also inspect your gutters for any signs of damage and recommend necessary repairs. Regular gutter cleaning is essential for maintaining the integrity of your home and preventing costly water damage.

We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, in the spring and fall, to remove accumulated debris. For homes near wooded areas, more frequent cleaning may be necessary. Don't risk injury by attempting to clean your gutters yourself. Let Classic Gutter Company handle the dirty work and protect your home from water damage.

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, in the spring and fall. Homes near trees may require more frequent cleaning.

faq.question: What happens if I don't clean my gutters?
faq.answer: Clogged gutters can lead to water damage to your roof, siding, foundation, and landscaping. They can also attract pests and rodents.

faq.question: How much does gutter cleaning cost?
faq.answer: The cost of gutter cleaning depends on the size of your home and the extent of the debris. We offer free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Gutter Guard Installation
services.shortDescription: Prevent clogs with our premium gutter guard systems for Chicago homes.
services.description:
Tired of constantly cleaning your gutters? Classic Gutter Company offers a wide selection of high-quality gutter guard systems designed to keep leaves, twigs, and debris out of your gutters. Gutter guards provide a long-term solution to prevent clogs and eliminate the need for frequent cleaning.

We offer various types of gutter guards to suit different needs and budgets, including mesh screens, micro-mesh, and foam inserts. Our experienced technicians will help you choose the best gutter guard system for your Chicago home and install it with precision and care. With gutter guards, you can enjoy peace of mind knowing that your gutters are protected from clogs and your home is safe from water damage.

Investing in gutter guards is a smart way to save time and money on gutter maintenance. Contact Classic Gutter Company today for a free consultation and learn more about our gutter guard options.
benefits: Eliminates the need for frequent cleaning

faq.question: What are the benefits of gutter guards?
faq.answer: Gutter guards prevent clogs, eliminate the need for frequent cleaning, and protect your home from water damage.

faq.question: What types of gutter guards do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of gutter guard systems, including mesh screens, micro-mesh, and foam inserts.

faq.question: How much do gutter guards cost?
faq.answer: The cost of gutter guards depends on the type of system and the size of your home. We offer free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Soffit and Fascia Repair
services.shortDescription: Protect your roof with expert soffit and fascia repair services in Chicago.
services.description:
Soffit and fascia play a crucial role in protecting your roof and home from moisture and pests. Damaged soffit and fascia can lead to water damage, rot, and pest infestations. Classic Gutter Company offers expert soffit and fascia repair services to keep your Chicago home protected.

Our experienced technicians will inspect your soffit and fascia for any signs of damage, such as cracks, rot, or peeling paint. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to repair or replace damaged sections, ensuring a seamless and durable repair. We also offer soffit and fascia painting services to enhance the appearance of your home.

Don't let damaged soffit and fascia compromise the integrity of your roof and home. Contact Classic Gutter Company for a free inspection and estimate.

faq.question: What are soffit and fascia?
faq.answer: Soffit is the material that covers the underside of your roof overhang, while fascia is the vertical board that runs along the edge of your roof.

faq.question: How do I know if my soffit and fascia need repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include cracks, rot, peeling paint, and pest infestations.

faq.question: How much does soffit and fascia repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of repair depends on the extent of the damage and the materials required. We offer free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Ice Dam Prevention
services.shortDescription: Prevent ice dams with our Chicago-specific solutions. Protect your home this winter!
services.description:
Chicago winters are notorious for ice dams, which can cause significant damage to your roof and gutters. As snow melts on your roof, it refreezes at the eaves, forming a dam that prevents water from draining properly. This can lead to water backing up under your shingles and causing leaks inside your home. Classic Gutter Company offers ice dam prevention services to protect your Chicago home from winter damage.

We offer various solutions to prevent ice dams, including heated gutter cables, roof snow removal, and attic insulation. Our experienced technicians will assess your home's specific needs and recommend the best solution for you. Don't wait until it's too late. Contact Classic Gutter Company to protect your home from ice dams this winter.
process: Step 3: Prevention Solution Implementation (heated cables, snow removal, etc.)
Step 4: System Testing & Winter Readiness Check
benefits: Prevents ice dams and water damage

faq.question: What are ice dams?
faq.answer: Ice dams are ridges of ice that form at the edge of your roof, preventing water from draining properly.

faq.question: How do I prevent ice dams?
faq.answer: Solutions include heated gutter cables, roof snow removal, and attic insulation.

faq.question: How much does ice dam prevention cost?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the solution and the size of your home. We offer free, no-obligation estimates.

services.name: Commercial Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive gutter solutions for Chicago businesses and commercial properties.
services.description:
Classic Gutter Company provides comprehensive gutter services for commercial properties throughout Chicago. We understand the unique needs of businesses and offer tailored solutions to protect your building from water damage. From installation and repair to cleaning and maintenance, we have the expertise to handle any commercial gutter project. 

Our experienced team works efficiently and safely to minimize disruption to your business operations. We use durable materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting performance and reliability. Whether you need a new gutter system for a retail building in Wicker Park or repairs to an existing system on an industrial property in Aurora, Classic Gutter Company delivers exceptional service and quality.

Protect your commercial investment with professional gutter services from Classic Gutter Company. Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.
benefits: Protects commercial property from water damage

faq.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts for commercial gutters?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized maintenance contracts to keep your commercial gutters in optimal condition.

faq.question: What types of commercial properties do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve a wide range of commercial properties, including retail buildings, office complexes, industrial facilities, and apartment buildings.

faq.question: Are you insured for commercial projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we are fully insured for all commercial gutter projects.

Known for its beautiful, upscale family homes built primarily between the 1970s and 2000s, Naperville presents unique gutter challenges. Our team understands the specific needs of Naperville homeowners, providing durable and efficient gutter solutions to protect your investment.

We specialize in seamless gutter installation, gutter repair, and gutter cleaning in Naperville. Given the harsh cold winters with heavy snow and ice, it's crucial to have a well-maintained gutter system to prevent water damage and ice dams. reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Classic Gutter Company did an amazing job cleaning my gutters. They were completely clogged with leaves and debris, and now they're flowing perfectly. The team was professional, efficient, and left my property clean. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John K.
reviews.text: I had a leak in my gutter, and Classic Gutter Company came out quickly to assess the damage and provide a repair solution. The repair was done efficiently and the price was reasonable. I'm very happy with the service.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: I had Classic Gutter Company install gutter guards on my home, and I'm so glad I did! No more climbing ladders to clean out leaves. The installation was professional, and the guards look great. Worth the investment!

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: Excellent service from start to finish. Classic Gutter Company installed new gutters on my home after the old ones were damaged in a storm. The team was knowledgeable, professional, and the installation was flawless. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Jennifer R.
reviews.text: Classic Gutter Company repaired some damaged soffit and fascia on my home. The work was done quickly and efficiently, and the price was fair. I'm very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: After a brutal Chicago winter, I decided to invest in ice dam prevention. Classic Gutter Company installed heated gutter cables, and they worked perfectly! No more ice dams and no more worries about water damage. Great investment!
